title: 🔻 Self-Affine Fractals
name: Self-Affine Fractals
what_it_is: Fractals with different scaling in different directions—stretched or warped symmetry. Common in nature (e.g., mountain ranges).
how_to_use: the landscape is a self-affine stretch—each ridge scaled nonuniformly in fractal logic
her limbs are elongated like self-affine branches—chaotic but balanced
animation_behavior: Scaling shifts along different axes, pulsing distortion over form ---
